name: song_composer
description: Schema for procedural music composition with nested pattern structures

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Song-level mood, energy, and style tags
properties.note: Each string is treated as an independent item in association rules

properties.name: instrument_list
properties.description: List of instruments used throughout the song
properties.note: Each instrument name is an independent item in association rules

properties.name: part_structure
properties.description: Sequence of part types defining song structure

properties.name: parts
properties.description: Dictionary of song parts keyed by part_structure items (e.g., 'verse_0', 'chorus_0')

properties.name: part_tags
properties.description: Part-specific energy/density descriptors (e.g., dense, sparse, energetic, mellow, upbeat, chill)
properties.note: Negative context weights create anti-correlation with previous parts for dynamic contrast

properties.name: duration_bars
properties.description: Duration of this part in bars (measures)
properties.note: Must be satisfied by total length of chord and instrument patterns

properties.name: chords
properties.description: Chord progression for this part using pattern/repetition structure

repetitions.formula: duration_bars / sum(len(patterns[p]) for p in pattern_structure)
repetitions.description: Auto-calculated: ensures total chord bars match duration_bars
repetitions.note: For chords, patterns can have multiple bars (multiple chords). Formula accounts for this.

patterns.description: Mapping of pattern IDs to chord sequences (e.g., {A: ['I', 'vi', 'IV', 'V'], B: ['I', 'V']})
patterns.note: Each chord in the list = 1 bar. Pattern A with 4 chords = 4 bars.

properties.name: instruments

repetitions.description: Auto-calculated: duration_bars divided by length of pattern_structure

patterns.description: Mapping of pattern IDs to rhythm patterns
patterns.note: Pattern encoding: '1' = event on beat 1 (whole note), '11' = events on beats 1&3 (half notes), '1010' = quarter notes, '10101010' = eighth notes, '1-10' = half note, quarter rest, quarter note. Each pattern = 1 bar.

properties.note: Dictionary keyed by instrument name. Each instrument must have patterns totaling duration_bars.

notes: Properties are generated in the order listed
Type system is domain-agnostic: string_list, object_dict, etc. describe structure, not semantics
part_structure is a string_list that generates: ['intro', 'verse', 'chorus', 'verse', 'chorus']
parts is an object_dict with keys_from='part_structure', creating keys like 'verse_0', 'chorus_0', 'verse_1'
Context references support correlation multipliers: positive = correlation, negative = anti-correlation
global.* refers to top-level properties, parts[-1].* refers to previous part
Pattern structures enforce duration constraints: pattern length × repetitions = duration_bars
Pattern encoding uses string notation: '1' = note, '0' = rest, '-' = hold/sustain
Calculated fields auto-compute values (e.g., repetitions = duration_bars / len(pattern_structure))
